title: [DOCS]: make sure that CGO_ENABLED is enable
body:
As we found out with kind Sir Miloslav Trmač, CGO_ENABLED has to enabled in order for the installed system libraries to get used and compile successfully.

Best Regards!

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Sorry for the delay. Thanks for the review!

Hope this satisfies you 😃

LGTM
The CI issues are known, hopefully we'll be able to rerun the failed tests soon and get this in.
